svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(15, 47, 87), rgb(176, 203, 238)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(15, 47, 87), rgb(176, 203, 238));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 30px; margin-left: 28px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 24px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
